# Test Companion: Sigma

## Purpose
Define minimum proof that Sigma produces clear, actionable structures.

## Goal to Prove
Sigma can convert messy decisions into prioritized steps with evidence of reduced drift.

## Proof Families
- Prioritization: produce an ordered plan that can be followed.
- Decomposition: break complex work into small verifiable steps.

## Minimum Proof
- One positive run producing a step-by-step plan and one boundary run signaling missing inputs.
